title: Meta employees allege discriminatory AI-driven layoffs
description: Twenty-six Meta employees have filed a lawsuit accusing the tech giant of using artificial intelligence to select workers for mass layoffs.
content:
Meta "did not pause the system for the individualized, leave- and accommodation-neutral review that the law requires," the 71-page complaint said.

title: AI for the electricity grid
description: Predictive maintenance tools based on artificial intelligence (AI) are already used in electricity grids around the world. What are the pros and cons?
content: Predictive maintenance (PM) is one of the much-touted features of the smart grid. Connected sensors collect data which is then used to analyze the state of the grid in real-time. PM can not only detect existing problems but also forecast equipment fa... [14492 chars]

title: New York is the first state to impose an AI data center ban
description: New York is blocking new large data centers that fuel artificial intelligence for up to a year to protect the environment and energy grid.
content:
NEW YORK (AP) — No large data centers can be built in New York for up to a year as the state creates rules to protect the environment and its energy grid from the power-hungry facilities fueling artificial intelligence.

title: Karnataka to roll out comprehensive data centre policy to support infra requirements of AI
description: Bengaluru, Jul 15 (PTI) The Karnataka government will out a comprehensive and sustainable Data Centre Policy to support the infrastructure requirements of artificial intelligence and next-generation computing, Bengaluru Business Corridor chairman L K Atheeq said here on Wednesday. Atheeq, who is also the financial advisor to Karnataka Chief Minister D K Shivakumar, made the announcement […]
content:
“Today everyone is talking about Artificial Intelligence. Naturally, every organisation wants to embrace AI. But AI also brings significant infrastructure challenges. It requires data centres,” Atheeq said.

title: George Lucas Says 'There's Nothing You Can Do About AI'
description: George Lucas says that artificial intelligence makes it easier to create cinema, calling it the future and progress.
content:

title: Australia to Impose Energy, Water Guardrails on Data Centers Amid A.I. Boom
description: The country will also seek to protect the rights of creators of work used to train artificial intelligence models, as it aims to impose parameters on the growing industry.

title: why data foundations matter more than algorithms
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) may dominate discussions across scientific R&D, but successful AI initiatives depend on solving much older foundational problems first: accessible data, connected workflows, clear governance, and organisational alignment.
